title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!
